data.body: Completion evidence — the ts-equals-commit-date invariant IS asserted, in the committed companion tests/scripts/test_backfill_complexity_clone_heldout.py::test_snapshot_ts_is_commit_date (held-out-TDD split; both files committed + green in CI #830 Verified+1): it commits with a known GIT_COMMITTER_DATE, backfills, and reads back via a NARROW date window (only Feb) to prove the snapshot ts equals the commit's committer date (a wall-clock ts would fall outside the window). This invariant is mutation-tested (forcing a fixed wall-clock ts makes the narrow-window read fail). The named happy file test_backfill_complexity_clone.py asserts count==3 + integer complexity/clone_count.
